## What's Changed

- Added optional Tube TV channel logo watermarks for server-side channels.
- Added a logo search and picker for custom Tube TV channels using the public TV logo catalog.
- Reworked Tube TV playback to serve HLS playlists and MPEG-TS segments for smoother video-to-commercial transitions.
- Added shared Tube TV HLS sessions so players can request the same channel stream cleanly.
- Added HLS discontinuity handling and cache reset behavior when Tube TV configuration changes.
- Improved Tube TV test coverage for channel logos, HLS playlist generation, and segment access.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, local media folders, commercial library, cache, and hardware device mappings.
